description: AI 모델 × 제품 광고. 고정 인물 3명 (yuna/jihoon/haewon) + Seedance 2.0 Identity Lock. 화장품/건강식품 카테고리별 즉시 사용 가능한 프롬프트 트리.

stages.prompt: Korean woman early morning in soft sunlit bathroom, holding [PRODUCT_NAME] cream jar in right hand, fresh skin no makeup, gently scoops cream with ring finger and applies onto cheek with circular motion, soft natural smile, slow camera push-in from medium to close-up, mirror reflection composition, photorealistic film grain, 9:16 vertical, preserve product label and skin texture
stages.negative: blurry, distorted hands, product label change, deformed face, extra fingers, plastic skin

stages.prompt: Same Korean woman, close-up of [PRODUCT_NAME] cream texture being absorbed into cheek, soft morning light, gentle finger pressing motion, macro lens feel, 9:16 vertical

stages.script_template: 오늘 아침 루틴, [PRODUCT_NAME] 하나로 끝났어요. 발림성 진짜 인생크림.
[PRODUCT_BENEFIT] 효과는 한 달 쓰니까 확실히 보여요.

checklist: [12~22초] Seedance 영상 2 + 보이스 라인 2 + 제품명 모션 텍스트
BGM: 모델 톤 매칭 (yuna=어쿠스틱 팝, haewon=미니멀 피아노) -18dB

stages.prompt: Korean woman, smooth transition from tired morning face with slight dark circles to glowing radiant skin with confident smile, [PRODUCT_NAME] held in hand visible throughout transition, golden hour to soft daylight lighting shift, professional beauty commercial style, 9:16 vertical
stages.negative: abrupt cut, identity drift, distorted face

stages.script_template: 2주 썼더니 진짜 달라졌어요. [PRODUCT_BENEFIT] 이 정도면 인정.

stages.prompt: Macro shot of Korean woman's hand with glowing skin scooping [PRODUCT_NAME] cream from jar, viscous glossy cream texture stretches between fingers in slow motion, light reflects on cream, hand rotates slowly, premium beauty commercial cinematic macro lens, 9:16 vertical

Korean man in modern minimal bathroom, applying [PRODUCT_NAME] onto freshly cleansed face with palm pressing motion, athletic shoulders visible, soft cool morning light, confident expression, photorealistic, 9:16 vertical
stages.negative: feminine pose, soft lighting, distorted hands

stages.script_template: [PRODUCT_NAME] 한 달 써본 결과. 남자 피부도 [PRODUCT_BENEFIT] 챙겨야죠.

stages.prompt: Korean person in bright morning kitchen, holding [PRODUCT_NAME] bottle, pours two capsules into palm, takes them with glass of water, fresh smile, energetic confident vibe, natural soft window light, slow camera dolly from hand to face, photorealistic lifestyle, 9:16 vertical

Korean woman in cozy bedroom evening with warm bedside lamp glow, opens [PRODUCT_NAME] package, takes a jelly stick or capsule, peaceful relaxed gentle smile to camera, comfy pajamas, warm cinematic atmosphere, slow camera dolly, photorealistic, 9:16 vertical

stages.script_template: 자기 전 [PRODUCT_NAME] 한 포. [PRODUCT_BENEFIT] 진짜 차원 달라요.

stages.prompt: Korean woman at minimal white desk, opens [PRODUCT_NAME] package with genuine excited surprised expression, lifts product out, examines details with curiosity, top-down hand shot composition then face close-up, smooth handheld feel, clean studio lifestyle photography, 9:16 vertical

Korean athletic man post-workout in modern gym, scoops [PRODUCT_NAME] powder into shaker bottle, shakes confidently, takes a sip with satisfied focused expression, dynamic gym lighting, slight motion blur on shake, photorealistic, 9:16 vertical

stages.script_template: 운동 후 [PRODUCT_NAME] 한 스쿱. [PRODUCT_BENEFIT] 진짜 차이 남.

production_checklist: Seedance 2.0 Identity Lock 대시보드에서 해당 identity 픽 + 프롬프트 입력
